title: selinum longicalycium
intro: Selinum longicalycium, also known as the mountain carrot or celery-leaved angelica, is a plant species belonging to the carrot family (Apiaceae). It is native to the mountainous regions of Europe and Asia, and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds. The health benefits of Selinum longicalycium include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain and digestive issues, and support the immune system. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat a range of health conditions.
